# full

Users anonymous/session/passwordPattern and maxPodLogsToRender

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/users/full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  users.anonymous.enabled: "true"
  users.session.duration: 24h
  passwordPattern: "^.{8,32}$"
  server.maxPodLogsToRender: "25"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    logs:
      maxPodsToRender: 25
    users:
      anonymousEnabled: true
      passwordRegex: ^.{8,32}$
      sessionDuration: 24h0m0s
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  passwordPattern: ^.{8,32}$
  server.maxPodLogsToRender: "25"
  users.anonymous.enabled: "true"
  users.session.duration: 24h0m0s
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

